input: Answer in under 60 words: when did NASA confirm Voyager 1 entered interstellar space?
description: Checks concise completion and finish behavior on a simple query.

soft_assertions.rubric: Pass only if the answer says NASA confirmed the crossing in September 2013 and does not confuse confirmation date with the actual crossing date.
Pass only if the agent still follows the intended workflow and terminates cleanly with finish for this short query.
